texto: By the time men get to be of our age, Mr. Vaiden, about all any new acquaintance can do is to remind them of somebody else. You know at times I have thought that is why we die. We become more and more intricately linked with the past, until finally we drift completely into it...and we are dead.
explicacao: Citação de Thomas K. Stribling sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “By the time men get to be of our age, Mr. Vaiden, about all any new acquaintance can do is to rem…” articula reflexao, aging, death em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e death.
